g.text: Reward mean +-1 std across 128 rollouts/step - 240 steps, one A100

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: rgb(107, 114, 128); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;
text.tspan: Conclusion: reward climbs from 0.03 to a best of 0.71 at step 234 with no collapse
(last-20-step mean 0.51); the best and final checkpoints score identically on the held-out eval.
